title: The Role of TP53 in Adaptation and Evolution.
tldr: The multilevel role of TP53 in adaptation is discussed, according to the published evidence, which is complicated, and it extends from cells to individuals and to populations.

title: SARS-CoV-2 infection induces a pro-inflammatory cytokine response through cGAS-STING and NF-kappaB.
tldr: Results show that SARS-CoV-2 directs a cGAS-STING mediated, NF-κB-driven inflammatory immune response in human epithelial cells that likely contributes to inflammatory responses seen in patients and could be therapeutically targeted to suppress severe disease symptoms.

title: Mapping mutations to the SARS-CoV-2 RBD that escape binding by different classes of antibodies.
tldr: Deep mutational scanning is used to identify mutations in the RBD that escape human monoclonal antibodies or convalescent plasmas that may escape neutralization by antibodies in SARS-CoV-2 mutants.
